TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sinti Lu Bo (Cyndi Lauper) hya' ga min'aring mhtuw mwah mqwas ga kawas tay 1983, nanu' quw cinqsu' niya' phtuw qwas niya' ka She's So Unusual na' lga memaw siy ktay kwara' na squliq kya la. nanak hiya' quw misan phtuw cinqsu' na qwas ga spayat quw qwas tay qsahuy niya' sqasa quw siy pslluhing magal squw gleng binkgan squw Top 5 ka Hayyo knayril, nanu' squw qsahuy niya' ka {Girls Just Want To Have Fun} ga, siy pslluhing minsazing rihay magal nibang, rikutu' na Platinum recordruw {Time After Time} ga siy pslluhing minsazing rihay magal iciybang, Gold record ruw {She Bop} ga siy pslluhing mincyugal rihay magal sanbang,Gold record ruw {All Through the Night} ga siy pslluhing minzmagal rihay magal gobang, qwas niya' nanak {She's So Unusual} ga magal squw pinspung binkgan Amerika ka Album charts ga magal yonbang, nanu' squw kawas qasa ga magal sa qnabu naha sa pzyang baq balay giqas na Hayyo na Grammy Award. pzyang cinqsu' balay kbalay pqwas sa minqsu balay ka kawas te 1980 qasa ga, laha' squw Madonna rrusa' naha' quw msspung na pqwas.
S.PHON: s~ɕinti lu βo (ʦ~ʨjn*i lauper) ħjaʔ ɣa minʔariŋ mħtuw mwaħ mqwas~ɕ ɣa kawas~ɕ taj ****, nanuʔ quw ʦ~ʨinqs~ɕuʔ nijaʔ pħtuw qwas~ɕ nijaʔ ka s~ɕħeʔs~ɕ s~ɕo unus~ɕual naʔ lɣa memaw s~ɕij ktaj kwaraʔ na s~ɕquliq kja la. nanak ħijaʔ quw mis~ɕan pħtuw ʦ~ʨinqs~ɕuʔ na qwas~ɕ ɣa s~ɕpajat quw qwas~ɕ taj qs~ɕaħuj nijaʔ s~ɕqas~ɕa quw s~ɕij ps~ɕlluħiŋ maɣal s~ɕquw ɣleŋ βinkɣan s~ɕquw top * ka ħajjo knajril, nanuʔ s~ɕquw qs~ɕaħuj nijaʔ ka {ɣirls~ɕ *us~ɕt want to ħa*e *un} ɣa, s~ɕij ps~ɕlluħiŋ mins~ɕaziŋ riħaj maɣal niβaŋ, rikutuʔ na platinum reʦ~ʨor*ruw {time a*ter time} ɣa s~ɕij ps~ɕlluħiŋ mins~ɕaziŋ riħaj maɣal iʦ~ʨijβaŋ, ɣol* reʦ~ʨor* ruw {s~ɕħe βop} ɣa s~ɕij ps~ɕlluħiŋ minʦ~ʨjuɣal riħaj maɣal s~ɕanβaŋ,ɣol* reʦ~ʨor* ruw {all tħrouɣħ tħe niɣħt} ɣa s~ɕij ps~ɕlluħiŋ minzmaɣal riħaj maɣal ɣoβaŋ, qwas~ɕ nijaʔ nanak {s~ɕħeʔs~ɕ s~ɕo unus~ɕual} ɣa maɣal s~ɕquw pins~ɕpuŋ βinkɣan amerika ka alβum ʦ~ʨħarts~ɕ ɣa maɣal jonβaŋ, nanuʔ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa ɣa maɣal s~ɕa qnaβu naħa s~ɕa pzjaŋ βaq βalaj ɣiqas~ɕ na ħajjo na ɣrammj awar*. pzjaŋ ʦ~ʨinqs~ɕuʔ βalaj kβalaj pqwas~ɕ s~ɕa minqs~ɕu βalaj ka kawas~ɕ te **** qas~ɕa ɣa, laħaʔ s~ɕquw ma*onna rrus~ɕaʔ naħaʔ quw ms~ɕs~ɕpuŋ na pqwas~ɕ.
S.FORM: Sinti Lu Bo (Cyndi Lauper) hya' ga min'aring mhtuw mwah mqwas ga kawas tay 1983, nanu' quw cinqsu' niya' phtuw qwas niya' ka She's So Unusual na' lga memaw siy ktay kwara' na squliq kya la. nanak hiya' quw misan phtuw cinqsu' na qwas ga spayat quw qwas tay qsahuy niya' sqasa quw siy pslluhing magal squw gleng binkgan squw Top 5 ka Hayyo knayril, nanu' squw qsahuy niya' ka {Girls Just Want To Have Fun} ga, siy pslluhing minsazing rihay magal nibang, rikutu' na Platinum recordruw {Time After Time} ga siy pslluhing minsazing rihay magal iciybang, Gold record ruw {She Bop} ga siy pslluhing mincyugal rihay magal sanbang,Gold record ruw {All Through the Night} ga siy pslluhing minzmagal rihay magal gobang, qwas niya' nanak {She's So Unusual} ga magal squw pinspung binkgan Amerika ka Album charts ga magal yonbang, nanu' squw kawas qasa ga magal sa qnabu naha sa pzyang baq balay giqas na Hayyo na Grammy Award. pzyang cinqsu' balay kbalay pqwas sa minqsu balay ka kawas te 1980 qasa ga, laha' squw Madonna rrusa' naha' quw msspung na pqwas.
S.PHON: s~ɕinti lu βo (ʦ~ʨjn*i lauper) ħjaʔ ɣa minʔariŋ mħtuw mwaħ mqwas~ɕ ɣa kawas~ɕ taj ****, nanuʔ quw ʦ~ʨinqs~ɕuʔ nijaʔ pħtuw qwas~ɕ nijaʔ ka s~ɕħeʔs~ɕ s~ɕo unus~ɕual naʔ lɣa memaw s~ɕij ktaj kwaraʔ na s~ɕquliq kja la. nanak ħijaʔ quw mis~ɕan pħtuw ʦ~ʨinqs~ɕuʔ na qwas~ɕ ɣa s~ɕpajat quw qwas~ɕ taj qs~ɕaħuj nijaʔ s~ɕqas~ɕa quw s~ɕij ps~ɕlluħiŋ maɣal s~ɕquw ɣleŋ βinkɣan s~ɕquw top * ka ħajjo knajril, nanuʔ s~ɕquw qs~ɕaħuj nijaʔ ka {ɣirls~ɕ *us~ɕt want to ħa*e *un} ɣa, s~ɕij ps~ɕlluħiŋ mins~ɕaziŋ riħaj maɣal niβaŋ, rikutuʔ na platinum reʦ~ʨor*ruw {time a*ter time} ɣa s~ɕij ps~ɕlluħiŋ mins~ɕaziŋ riħaj maɣal iʦ~ʨijβaŋ, ɣol* reʦ~ʨor* ruw {s~ɕħe βop} ɣa s~ɕij ps~ɕlluħiŋ minʦ~ʨjuɣal riħaj maɣal s~ɕanβaŋ,ɣol* reʦ~ʨor* ruw {all tħrouɣħ tħe niɣħt} ɣa s~ɕij ps~ɕlluħiŋ minzmaɣal riħaj maɣal ɣoβaŋ, qwas~ɕ nijaʔ nanak {s~ɕħeʔs~ɕ s~ɕo unus~ɕual} ɣa maɣal s~ɕquw pins~ɕpuŋ βinkɣan amerika ka alβum ʦ~ʨħarts~ɕ ɣa maɣal jonβaŋ, nanuʔ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa ɣa maɣal s~ɕa qnaβu naħa s~ɕa pzjaŋ βaq βalaj ɣiqas~ɕ na ħajjo na ɣrammj awar*. pzjaŋ ʦ~ʨinqs~ɕuʔ βalaj kβalaj pqwas~ɕ s~ɕa minqs~ɕu βalaj ka kawas~ɕ te **** qas~ɕa ɣa, laħaʔ s~ɕquw ma*onna rrus~ɕaʔ naħaʔ quw ms~ɕs~ɕpuŋ na pqwas~ɕ.
